name: mcworld-converter
description: Conversor de Mundos Bedrock - transforma pastas de mundo do Minecraft Bedrock em arquivos .mcworld, preservando Behavior/Resource Packs (incluindo arquivos .mcpack/.mcaddon).

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=client && npm run build --workspace=server
scripts.dev:server: npm run build --workspace=server && npm run start --workspace=server
